final:
module temp_shutdown (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] temp_reading,
    input [3:0] threshold,
    output reg shutdown_signal
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            shutdown_signal <= 0;
        end else if (temp_reading > threshold) begin
            shutdown_signal <= 1;
        end else begin
            shutdown_signal <= 0;
        end
    end
endmodule
